title: karath #3772
definition:
1) to cut, cut off, cut down, cut off a body part, cut out, eliminate,
    kill, cut a covenant
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cut off
             1a1a) to cut off a body part, behead
        1a2) to cut down
        1a3) to hew
        1a4) to cut or make a covenant
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be cut off
        1b2) to be cut down
        1b3) to be chewed
        1b4) to be cut off, fail
    1c) (Pual)
        1c1) to be cut off
        1c2) to be cut down
    1d) (Hiphil)
        1d1) to cut off
        1d2) to cut off, destroy
        1d3) to cut down, destroy
        1d4) to take away
        1d5) to permit to perish
    1e) (Hophal) cut off
